betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Foundry Basin§f

§aCollect molten metal from the crucible and cast it into forms.§f

The §bFoundry Basin§f is placed adjacent to or below a §bCrucible§f to collect molten metal. When combined with a §bFoundry Mold§f, you can cast specific shapes like ingots, plates, blocks, and more.

§6Crafting§f:
Made at the Steel Anvil.

§6Setup§f:
§b• Place§f the basin next to or beneath the crucible
§b• Insert§f a foundry mold for the desired shape
§b• Pour§f molten metal from the crucible into the basin
§b• Cool§f and extract the finished casting

§6Specifications§f:
§b• Capacity§f: Multiple ingots worth of molten metal
§b• Molds§f: Different molds produce different shapes
§b• Cooling§f: Castings solidify over time

§eTip§f: Using the foundry basin is more efficient than stamping plates at the press. For large-scale manufacturing, the foundry is the better option.
